summary: Authenticated Codex runtime, local secret-lifecycle guards, a current-package configured secret/auth marker scan, and a packaged dry-run Codex OAuth image capability confirmation now exist. The active dry-run archive and native app scan clean for configured Codex/OpenAI secrets, auth.json, local workspace, and long bearer token markers, and DF-244 packaged generate/export evidence proves the packaged app surface can drive Codex OAuth image generation without an API key. Release evidence still lacks clean-account login/logout-relogin, packaged keychain lifecycle, and clean-machine signed-package secret scanning.
